tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"id agent 2>/dev/null || true; su -s /bin/sh -c 'for p in /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc; do echo \"== $p ==\"; namei -l \"$p\"; done; for f in /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png; do echo \"== $f ==\"; ls -l \"$f\"; cat \"$f\" >/dev/null && echo READ_OK || echo READ_FAIL; done' agent"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content: id agent 2>/dev/null || true; su -s /bin/sh -c 'for p in /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc; do echo "== $p =="; namei -l "$p"; done; for f in /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png; do echo "== $f =="; ls -l "$f"; cat "$f" >/dev/null && echo READ_OK || echo READ_FAIL; done' agent

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"chmod 700 /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc; find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc -type f \\( -name '*.png' -o -name '*.jpg' -o -name '*.jpeg' -o -name '*.gif' -o -name '*.svg' -o -name '*.txt' -o -name '*.pdf' -o -name '*.doc' -o -name '*.docx' -o -name '*.odt' \\) -exec chmod 600 {} +; su -s /bin/sh -c 'for p in /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc; do echo \"== $p ==\"; namei -l \"$p\"; done; for f in /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png; do echo \"== $f ==\"; ls -l \"$f\"; cat \"$f\" >/dev/null && echo READ_OK || echo READ_FAIL; done' agent"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content: chmod 700 /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc; find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc -type f \( -name '*.png' -o -name '*.jpg' -o -name '*.jpeg' -o -name '*.gif' -o -name '*.svg' -o -name '*.txt' -o -name '*.pdf' -o -name '*.doc' -o -name '*.docx' -o -name '*.odt' \) -exec chmod 600 {} +; su -s /bin/sh -c 'for p in /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc; do echo "== $p =="; namei -l "$p"; done; for f in /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png; do echo "== $f =="; ls -l "$f"; cat "$f" >/dev/null && echo READ_OK || echo READ_FAIL; done' agent
